name: open-query
description: Open-source, self-hostable data exploration tool with natural language SQL generation

scripts.package:mac: SQLITE3_DIR=$(pwd)/$(find node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@*/node_modules/better-sqlite3 -maxdepth 0 | head -1) && pnpm --filter @open-query/api build:bundle && npx @electron/rebuild -v $(cat apps/electron/node_modules/electron/dist/version) -f --arch arm64 -m apps/api && pnpm --filter @open-query/electron build && cd apps/electron && npx electron-builder --mac; cd "$SQLITE3_DIR" && node_modules/.bin/prebuild-install --download
